b=280740+12554425 C=M and b M=262366+13225142 C=C or M else F=-205472-(-205473)I=#q O=H(F,I)C=-773037+10294775 F=z(q,O)O=nil I=d[g]h=172283-172282 s=F-h b=e(s)I[F]=b F=nil end else if C<3197837-317793 H=d[x[235418-235414]]e=d[x[-623332+623334]]R=-1029083+1029085 O=d[x[154047-154044]]q=O-n O=-132345-(-132377)g=q/O f=K-g P=R^f z=e/P P=17378+-17377 y=H(z)H=4294831792-(-135504)v=y%H y=320268-320266 C=#A return w(M)end,{},function(Z)local E,C=148149+-148148,Z[84709+-84708]while C do n[C],E=n[C]-(76465+-76464),E+(559059-559058)if-784573+784573==n[C]then n[C],d[C]=nil,nil end C=Z[E]end return(y(4926416-(-730609),{}))(w(M))end)(getfenv and getfenv()or _ENV,unpack or table[E(722393+-731409)],newproxy,setmetatable,getmetatable,select,{...})end)(...)
